q: What attracts you to someone first?
options: Physical chemistry — instant spark
Their ambition and drive
Emotional depth and vulnerability
How they make everyone around them feel

q: In a relationship, you need most:
options: Romance and beauty — keep the magic alive
Passion and challenge — keep me on my toes
Safety and emotional honesty
Freedom and shared growth
Someone who doesn't put in effort
Someone who avoids conflict
Someone who can't be emotionally present
Someone who tries to control or limit you

q: The best date you can imagine:
options: Candlelit dinner, flowers, the whole aesthetic
Something competitive — escape room, sports, a dare
Cooking together, deep talking until 4am
Road trip to somewhere neither of you has been

q: When you fall in love, you:
options: Romanticize everything about them
Want to conquer the world together
Open up in ways that terrify you
Feel like the universe just expanded
Mourn the beauty of what was
Channel the pain into something productive
Feel broken for a while, then slowly heal
Take a trip or start something new

q: Your love language in one word:
options: Beauty
Intensity
Closeness
Adventure

q: The thing that makes you stay in a relationship:
options: They still give you butterflies
They match your energy and ambition
They feel like home
They help you become a better version of yourself
Falling for the idea of someone, not the reality
Turning love into a power struggle
Giving too much and losing yourself
Running when things get too real

q: Love, at its best, feels like:
options: A movie scene you'll never forget
Two warriors choosing each other every day
Being fully known and still wanted
A never-ending story that keeps surprising you
